query: Fetch BigEarthNet in Switzerland for and run the ResNet-32 classifier. Please plot on the map the 'Vineyards' and 'Fruit trees and berry plantations' LCC classes

task0.objective: Fetch images from the BigEarthNet dataset and filter the images specifically from Switzerland.

task1.objective: Run the ResNet-32 classifier on the fetched BigEarthNet images to detect 'Vineyards' and 'Fruit trees and berry plantations'.

task2.objective: Plot the results of the ResNet-32 classification, highlighting 'Vineyards' and 'Fruit trees and berry plantations' on the map.
